query:
-- 1. Wipe fabricated seed data (preserve any admin-uploaded real docs)
DELETE FROM actor_timeline_links WHERE timeline_event_id IN (SELECT id FROM timeline_events WHERE id < 200000);
DELETE FROM actor_document_links WHERE actor_id IN (SELECT id FROM actors WHERE id < 200000);
DELETE FROM timeline_events WHERE id < 200000;
DELETE FROM public_records_requests WHERE id < 200000;
DELETE FROM actors WHERE id < 200000;
UPDATE stories SET
  case_number = 'CR23-0657',
  court = 'Second Judicial District Court, Washoe County, Nevada — Department 8',
  judge = 'Barry L. Breslow',
  prosecutor = 'Aziz Merchant, Deputy District Attorney (Washoe County DA)',
  defense_attorney = 'Galen Carrico (conflict counsel, appointed June 2024); Samuel Figueroa (2025); Joel Merchant (July 2025)',
  charges = 'Grand Larceny of a Motor Vehicle (NRS 205.228); Unlawful Taking of a Motor Vehicle (added Aug 2023)',
  date_case_started = '2023-03-12 00:00:00',
  custody_days = 110,
  still_pending = 1,
  trial_held = 0,
  requested_trial = 1,
  counsel_waived_time = 1,
  filings_blocked = 1,
  asked_self_rep = 1
WHERE id = 60001;
